title: boechera pusilla
intro: Boechera pusilla, also known as rock cress or alpine rockcress, is a small, delicate flowering plant native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Boechera pusilla include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis, as well as soothing digestive issues like nausea and diarrhea. Boechera pusilla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
